'''Beatonn''' was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[V'nnuk'rk]]''. She was [[Fable Astin/Legends|Fable Astin's]] commanding officer.<ref name="Uhl Eharl Khoehng" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Personality and traits==
Despite being a young woman, Beatonn's hair was prematurely gray.

==Appearances==
